title: Spartan Weaponry: Blue Skies
description: Addon mod for Spartan Weaponry that adds compatibility with Blue Skies.
body:
**
Adds new [Blue Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/blue-skies) themed weapons and traits to [Spartan Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry).
**
### Supported materials: - **Pyrope** - **Aquite** - **Diopside** - **Charoite** - **Horizonite** - Scorching - Sets foes on fire for 3 seconds ###
Planned updates: - Support 1.19.2 - Support 1.18.2 - Fix any [bugs](https://github.com/KreloX/SpartanSkies/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3Abug)
**
Get yourself a server with 15% off the first month at Kinetic Hosting with code KRELOX
